2605.30046.title: Masked Diffusion Modeling for Anomaly Detection
2605.30046.paper_summary: Anomaly detection aims to identify samples that deviate from the nominal data distribution and is central to many safety-critical applications. However, developing effective anomaly detection methods for categorical, mixed-type, and discrete sequence data remains challenging and relatively underexplored. Masked diffusion models provide a natural way to model such data by learning to recover masked values from the remaining visible context. In this paper, we propose Masked Diffusion for Anomaly Detection (MaskDiff-AD), a forward-only method based on masked diffusion models trained only on nominal data. Given a test sample, MaskDiff-AD constructs anomaly scores from the difficulty of reconstructing randomly masked coordinates, yielding a content-sensitive score that operates directly on discrete state spaces while avoiding reverse-time sampling. We also develop a non-parametric variant of MaskDiff-AD and provide theoretical guarantees by characterizing Type-I and Type-II errors under a fixed detection threshold. Experiments on fourteen categorical and mixed-type tabular datasets from ADBench and UADAD, as well as four text anomaly detection datasets from NLP-ADBench, show that MaskDiff-AD achieves competitive performance against classical, diffusion-based, and recent tabular/text anomaly detection baselines. Notably, MaskDiff-AD achieves the best overall average rank, outperforming all twelve tabular baseline methods.
2605.30046.paper_summary_zh: 異常檢測旨在識別偏離名義數據分佈的樣本，並且在許多安全關鍵應用中至關重要。<lb/>然而，為類別、混合型和離散序列數據開發有效的異常檢測方法仍然具有挑戰性且相對未被深入探索。<lb/>遮罩擴散模型提供了一種自然的方式來建模這類數據，通過學習從其餘可見上下文中恢復遮罩值。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了用於異常檢測的遮罩擴散（Masked Diffusion for Anomaly Detection，MaskDiff-AD），這是一種僅基於名義數據訓練的單向方法。<lb/>給定一個測試樣本，MaskDiff-AD根據隨機遮罩坐標的重建難度構建異常分數，產生一個內容敏感的分數，該分數直接作用於離散狀態空間，同時避免反向時間取樣。<lb/>我們還開發了一種MaskDiff-AD的非參數變體，並通過在固定檢測閾值下表徵第一類和第二類錯誤來提供理論保證。<lb/>在來自ADBench和UADAD的十四個類別和混合型表格數據集，以及來自NLP-ADBench的四個文本異常檢測數據集上的實驗顯示，MaskDiff-AD在與傳統、基於擴散的以及最近的表格/文本異常檢測基準相比時，達到了具有競爭力的性能。<lb/>值得注意的是，MaskDiff-AD在所有十二種表格基準方法中實現了最佳的整體平均排名，超越了所有這些方法。
2605.30046.author: Lixing Zhang et.al.
2605.30046.authors: Lixing Zhang, Yuchen Liang, Liyan Xie
